description: Deed of gift in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Dated: last third of Adar 1428 Sel. = February/March 1117 CE. The upper part is missing. A woman whose name is not preserved bequeaths a house, part of which she owns, to another woman, Sitt al-Dar bt. Shaʾul, probably her daughter (or housekeeper?). This is a will made "by a healthy person," and therefore irrevocable. Another part of the duwayra (small compound) was owned by al-ʿaniyim (the poor), i.e. by the qodesh. To prevent any loss to the qodesh, the recipient of the estate was forbidden to sell it to non-Jews or to build an additional floor over it. In case she sold it, the same restrictions would have to be applied to the purchaser. It is also stated that Sitt al-Dār will serve and care for her benefactor until her benefactor's death. Signed by Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi, Avraham b. Shelomo, Yiṣḥaq b. Ghālib ha-Ḥazzan, Moshe b. ʿEli and Ḥalfon b. Yosef ha-Kohen. Validated by Avraham b. Shemaʿya ha-Haver descendant of Shemaʿya Gaon, Yiṣḥaq b. Shemuʾel ha-Sefaradi, and Avraham b. Moshe. (Information in part from CUDL and from Gil, Documents, pp. 232 #41.)
description_he: שטר מתנה בכתב חלפון בן מנשה, אדר 1428 לשטרות (1117). אישה ששמה לא נשמר מורישה בית לסיתת-אל-דאר בת שאול. אסורה למכור לנכרים או לבנות קומה נוספת. סית-אל-דאר תשרת ותטפל במוריה עד מותה.
